values.gpt: A black button-front baseball jersey featuring 'BLACK IS BEAUTIFUL' text on the chest with contrast white piping.
values.claude: A black button-front baseball jersey featuring 'BLACK IS BEAUTIFUL' in white arched varsity lettering across the chest, with white contrast piping along the placket and collar, white striped sleeve cuffs, and a Black Rose Collection woven patch near the hem.
values.gemini: A black short-sleeved baseball jersey with contrasting white piping along the V-neck, button placket, and sleeve cuffs. The phrase 'BLACK IS BEAUTIFUL' is written in white arched letters across the chest.
